name: OrasBackup
postCreateCommand: dotnet restore && docker run -d -p 5000:5000 --name registry registry:2 && curl -LO https://github.com/oras-project/oras/releases/download/v1.2.2/oras_1.2.2_linux_amd64.tar.gz && tar -xzf oras_1.2.2_linux_amd64.tar.gz && sudo mv oras /usr/local/bin/ && rm oras_1.2.2_linux_amd64.tar.gz
